scripts.dev: concurrently --names SERVER,CLIENT --prefix-colors blue,green "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix server --legacy-peer-deps && npm install --prefix client
scripts.db:setup: npm run db:generate --prefix server && npm run db:migrate --prefix server && npm run db:seed --prefix server
scripts.lint: concurrently "npm run lint --prefix server" "npm run lint --prefix client"
